Title: Gotrax KS1 Kids Kick Scooter, LED Lighted Wheels and 3 Adjustable Height Handlebars, Lean-to-Steer & Widen Anti-Slip Deck, 3
Features: EXCITING GLOWING WHEELS: The 3 wheels are equipped with powerful LEDs, igniting a brilliant glow, captivating the young riders with its enchanting charm. Safety is never compromised, as the scooter becomes a captivating spectacle even in the dark, providing peace of mind for parents. | THE IDEAL FIRST KIDS SCOOTER: The KS1 kids scooter is featuring Lean-to-Steer technology, kids can turn by leaning and it helps to develop their balance and coordination. The handlebars of this scooter can be set to 3 different heights(33.7/31.9/29.9 inches) and ensure the scooter grows with your children. | EASY TO DISASSEMBLE AND CARRY: Just press the red button on the stem and pull out the stem to complete the disassembly, simply press the red button and insert the stem into the base to complete the installation. This kid's scooter weighs just 5.1lbs, making it light enough to carry and compact enough to fit in your car trunk or store with ease. | SAFE & SMOOTH RIDE EXPERIENCE: Gotrax KS1 kick scooter is equipped with ABEC-7 Bearings wheels, the scooter offers extra stability and smooth rides even on uneven and bumpy surfaces. The wide anti-slip deck (5 inches) and rear mudguard brake ensure your child's safety while riding. | EXCELLENT SERVICE: Gotrax offers a 1-year manufacturer's assurance, providing assurance that your Gotrax KS1 kid's scooter is built to last. Any questions, please contact us at any time and we're happy to help!

Title: VOLPAM Electric Scooter, 350W/500W/800W/1000W/250W Powerful Motor & 19/22/ 9 MPH Top Speed, 16-28-10 Miles Long Range, Foldin
Features: 【Powerful Performance】The electric scooter Equipped with 350W powerful motor and high capacity battery, electric scooter allows for speeds up to 19 mph and max range up to 15 miles under specific conditions. Scooter has 4 hours fast charging function, perfect for daily commuting or short trip. | 【Keep You Safe】Dual Braking System(front electronic brake+rear wheel drum brake）+ Lighting System(warning taillight + bright headlight) + 8.5” solid tires(provide a good ride and are very smooth) electric scooter bring you more comfortable and safer riding experience. | 【Smart App Control & LCD Display】Just turn on Bluetooth, pair the smart App with your smartphone, and you can set all the functions of the scooter. It is suitable for iPhone and Android smartphones. Fitted with a cutting-edge LCD screen, ensuring a clear view of your speed, battery level, distance, and other features as you ride(The APP provides more functions for this electric scooter, but it is also can be ridden without the APP) | 【Lightweight & Folding】 The electric scooter Can be folded in 3 seconds. The compact design can be easily put into the trunk of the car. It provides great convenience and fun for your city travel, campus travel, and office commuting | 【Quality Assurance】 VOLPAM pursues excellent performance and quality products for the users. 12-month or 180-day for different parts, please contact us if you have any questions.

Product_Description: Give your child the perfect first scooter experience with the Mini 3-Wheel Kids Scooter, designed for stability, safety, and endless fun. The lean-to-steer technology makes turning effortless and helps develop balance and coordination, while the three-wheel trike-style design ensures a steady and secure ride. With an adjustable T-bar handlebar offering four height settings, this scooter grows with your child making it long-lasting. Watch their excitement as the built-in LED light-up wheels glow in motion—no batteries required! The smooth-gliding engineered polyurethane wheels provide a quiet and stable ride, whether indoors or outdoors. The wide, anti-slip deck gives little feet plenty of room to stand securely, and the rear foot brake ensures easy and reliable stopping power for added safety. Designed for kids ages 2 and up, this scooter is built with durable and lightweight materials, making it easy to carry, store, and take on the go. Simple assembly means your little one will be scooting in no time! Whether it’s for daily adventures, playdates, or outdoor fun, the Mini 3-Wheel Kids Scooter is the perfect ride to keep them active, engaged, and smiling.

Jupiter Light-Up Folding Kick Scooter A Universe to Explore With its lightweight frame and simple folding mechanism, the Jupiter can be carried and transported easily. Take it  to the park, on vacation - or wherever good rides await.

Jupiter Light-Up Folding Kick Scooter Shining Bright Riding the Jupiter, with its in-frame illumination and motion-activated light-up wheels, puts a twinkle in their eyes. (Bonus: The lights also keep kids visible and easier to spot!)
There are 7 preprogrammed lighting modes for riders to choose from. Whichever they pick, they'll stay more visible to passersby.
The Jupiter folds in half for storage and transport. Weighing just 6 pounds, it's easy for kids to carry themselves.
A sturdy frame, slip-resistant standing deck, and quick-react rear foot brake give energetic riders great support.
As kids grow, so can this scooter. It's easy to raise the padded-grip handlebar so it's always at the right height.

Product_Description: Highlights Kick-scooting on 2 spectacular fully illuminated wheels. Fun, foldable, and the right fit, thanks to a height-adjustable handlebar. Lightweight and sturdy frame – the perfect combo for kids. Product Details Beaming lights, radiant smiles. This 2-wheeler delivers a whole lot of happy. Kick the energy up a notch with this brilliant kids’ kick scooter. Color soars out of every direction from the fully illuminated wheels, and flashing LED lights send cascades of sparkle up and down the stem. The Moonbeam brightens up the entire block – including the kids riding it. This is a scooter, after all, that’s all about the inner glow. Fun in sight There are 20 different illumination effects kids can choose for the wheels. All of them keep kids extra-visible. Hold steady Height-adjustable and with durable comfort grips, the handlebar allows for optimal positioning and control. Collapse and carry Easy to fold. Lightweight for carrying. The Moonbeam can stow and go almost anywhere. Product Weight 6.2 lb. Weight Limit 132 lb. Brake Rear Foot Brake Wheel Size 4 in. Deck Size 17.3" x 3.6" Product Dimensions (L x W x H) 24.0" x 9.8" x 24.6" Folded Dimensions (L x W x H) 24.8" x 9.8" x 7.7" For Riders Aged 5+ Assembly Required Partial

Title: Aovowheel Electric Scooter Adults, Foldable 8.5" Tires E Scooter for Adults, 350W Motor, Kick Scooters Max 16 Miles Long Rang
Features: 【Powerful Motor & Long Range】 Equipped with a 350W motor, the Aovowheel purple scooter reaches speeds up to 19 MPH and delivers up to 21 miles of riding on a single charge. Perfect for school commutes, weekend adventures, or park rides, this electric scooter offers excitement and reliable performance for young riders | 【Dual Braking & Bright Lighting System for Safe】The scooter has EABS front brake and rear drum brake for responsive stopping power. Bright LED headlights illuminate the path, while the rear brake light increases visibility during evening rides. The 8.5-inch solid tires provide shock absorption and a smooth ride across different terrains | 【Cool Graffiti Deck & Non-Slip Design】The Purple model features a vibrant graffiti-style purple foot deck, making it visually appealing and unique. Great for kids to show off their personality while commuting to and from school, cruising around the neighborhood, or enjoying outdoor fun! | 【Intelligent APP control & Three Adjustable Speed Modes】Supports connection to dedicated APP, allows monitoring of escooter status and setting speed limits, customizable cruise mode, and lighting settings. This scooter features three speed modes (E-7.5 MPH, D-11 MPH, S-19 MPH) suitable for beginners to advanced riders. The high-definition LCD screen clearly displays battery level, speed, mileage, and other data, allowing you to understand your riding status at a glance | 【Lightweight & Foldable for Easy Carrying】Our Innovative e-scooter features 3-second fast folding technology, enabling one-click storage. Weighing only 22 pounds and compact in folding size, it can easily fit into the trunk of a car or take public transportation, it’s perfect for family trips or city living. Kids can bring their scooter anywhere with no hassle
